mapper.select: SELECT b.blog_id, b.blog_title, b.blog_content, b.recommend_index, b.blog_words, b.read_time, b.create_time, b.update_time, c.category_name, t.tag_name, t.tag_color FROM yue_blog.blog b LEFT JOIN yue_blog.blog_category bc ON b.blog_id = bc.blog_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.category c ON bc.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.blog_tag bt ON b.blog_id = bt.blog_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.tag t ON bt.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE b.blog_id = #{blogId}
SELECT b.blog_id, b.blog_title, b.blog_introduction FROM yue_blog.blog b WHERE b.blog_introduction like '%${query}%' or b.blog_title like '%${query}%'
SELECT b.blog_id, b.blog_title, date_format(create_time, "%Y年%m月") AS yearMonth, date_format(create_time, "%d日") AS day FROM yue_blog.blog b ORDER BY b.create_time DESC;
SELECT b.blog_id, b.blog_title FROM yue_blog.blog b order by create_time desc

SELECT b.blog_id, b.blog_title, b.blog_introduction, b.recommend_index, b.blog_words, b.read_time, b.create_time, c.category_name, t.tag_name, t.tag_color FROM yue_blog.blog b LEFT JOIN yue_blog.blog_category bc ON b.blog_id = bc.blog_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.category c ON bc.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.blog_tag bt ON b.blog_id = bt.blog_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.tag t ON bt.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE t.tag_name = #{tagName}

SELECT b.blog_id, b.blog_title, b.blog_introduction, b.recommend_index, b.blog_words, b.read_time, b.create_time, c.category_name, t.tag_name, t.tag_color FROM yue_blog.blog b LEFT JOIN yue_blog.blog_category bc ON b.blog_id = bc.blog_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.category c ON bc.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.blog_tag bt ON b.blog_id = bt.blog_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.tag t ON bt.tag_id = t.tag_id WHERE c.category_name = #{categoryName}

SELECT b.blog_id, b.blog_title, b.blog_introduction, b.recommend_index, b.blog_words, b.read_time, b.create_time, c.category_name, t.tag_name, t.tag_color FROM yue_blog.blog b LEFT JOIN yue_blog.blog_category bc ON b.blog_id = bc.blog_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.category c ON bc.category_id = c.category_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.blog_tag bt ON b.blog_id = bt.blog_id LEFT JOIN yue_blog.tag t ON bt.tag_id = t.tag_id
